introSection: Inferno is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. Opened in 2007, it was manufactured by Intamin and constructed onsite by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back-to-back in rows of two on either side of the track.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On 7 July 2014 at around 4:30 PM, an 18-year-old man fell from the ride. He sustained numerous serious injuries and died at the scene.

fullText:
Inferno is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Terra Mítica in Benidorm, Alicante, Valencian Community, Spain. Opened in 2007, it was manufactured by Intamin and constructed onsite by RCS GmbH.



Riders sit back-to-back in rows of two on either side of the track.

On 7 July 2014 at around 4:30 PM, an 18-year-old man fell from the ride. He sustained numerous serious injuries and died at the scene.
